title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system that enables legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Built with Claude, it applies new large language model capabilities to modernize legal document interpretation and workflow automation.
